author: Haroen Viaene
subject: docs(hooks): add Panel to example (algolia/react-instantsearch#3203)
body:
* docs(hooks): add Panel to example

This isn't the full panel (doesn't communicate to hide or collapse), but does allow for more spacing between widgets. A more complete panel will require implementing a usePanel that we can do later, as the InstantSearch.js panel is only a widget, not a connector

* redivide

Co-authored-by: François Chalifour <francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>
